title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 08 August 2025

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 08 August 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 09/08/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye showed mixed trends this week, with some signs of improvement but overall activity was still measured. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye showed mixed trends this week, with some signs of improvement but overall activity was still
measured. Seasonal factors and regulatory developments remain key influences on sentiment.
